gverify_response.name: Unverified Account
gverify_response.description: The routing number submitted belongs to a financial institution; however, this financial institution does not report information to the National Shared Database. The financial institutions that do report to the National Shared Database have not reported any recent experience (positive or negative) with this account.

link.description:
Dear Facebook,

I'm reporting multiple fake accounts impersonating Stray Kids members. Despite blocking, new accounts emerge. Please help address this issue.

most_relevant_reviews.text:
Dear Facebook,

I'm reporting multiple fake accounts impersonating Stray Kids members. Despite blocking, new accounts emerge. Please help address this issue.

link.description: This is the worst platform in the world, all their administrators are in Africa, Meta hires the cheapest labor with no education and no knowledge of English. There is no support service. My main account was blocked for unknown reasons, they didn’t even send an email with the reason, which is necessarily their rule. Administrators are so stupid that they cannot simply look up the IP address if you have been hacked by hackers. And they work according to a template without investigation, blocking all pages in a row without protecting your personal data. They are so stupid that they blocked two of my business pages on Facebook and Instagram, although the business pages have nothing to do with the main one. They also brought them money from purchased advertising. Absolutely untrained and unresponsive workers. This is just a disgrace to the entire management and founder... stupid management and stupid employees without education... it's just wasted time and money... transfer all your business to TikTok there are more people and attitude towards people... Don't work with Meta, you will be blocked and deleted without explanation or investigation! !! Shame on the entire office!!!

most_relevant_reviews.text: This is the worst platform in the world, all their administrators are in Africa, Meta hires the cheapest labor with no education and no knowledge of English. There is no support service. My main account was blocked for unknown reasons, they didn’t even send an email with the reason, which is necessarily their rule. Administrators are so stupid that they cannot simply look up the IP address if you have been hacked by hackers. And they work according to a template without investigation, blocking all pages in a row without protecting your personal data. They are so stupid that they blocked two of my business pages on Facebook and Instagram, although the business pages have nothing to do with the main one. They also brought them money from purchased advertising. Absolutely untrained and unresponsive workers. This is just a disgrace to the entire management and founder... stupid management and stupid employees without education... it's just wasted time and money... transfer all your business to TikTok there are more people and attitude towards people... Don't work with Meta, you will be blocked and deleted without explanation or investigation! !! Shame on the entire office!!!
